use_department_attributes.description: boolean value. set it as true if you want to use department default attributes.

online_featured_product.description: boolean value. set it as a true if we want to display these product in main screen of online application. defaults to false.

cost_per_case.description: cost per case price of product.

no_of_eaches.description: no of eaches(Number of Base Units in a Case) of product.

vendors.description: a vendor in ecommerce refers to a person or business that sells products or services on an online platform.

item_code.description: vendor item code are unique identifiers assigned to each item sold by a vendor in an ecommerce platform.

age_verification.description: In order to protect bars, restaurant owners and convenience store owners that sell age-restricted products, POS has an Age Verification feature. This will help ensure that products that require age cannot be sold to under aged customers.

min_age_verification.description: minimun age to buy the age restricted product. this field is required when value of age_verification is true.

sold_by_weight.description: boolean value. set it as true if you want to sale these product by loose weight. defaults to false.

tare_container_ids.description: ids of tare containers. tare containers are only add when products is sold by weight.

exclude_ebt.description: boolean value. set it as true if you want to sale these product with ebt tax exemption. defaults to false.

prompt_qty.description: boolean value. set it as true when you prompt for quantity on products.

variable_sale_price.description: boolean value. set to true if every time ask customer sale price. defaults to false.

exclude_kds.description: boolean value. set it as true if you don't want to display these product in kitchen display  screen(KDS) and in order print. defaults to false.

post.description: This endpoint is use to create the tax.

type.description: type of tax. amount or percentage.

rate.description: rate of tax. for "percentage" type tax, rate must between 0.01 to 100 and for "amount" type tax, rate must between 0.01 to 999999.99

exempt_ebt.description: If set this flag as true, then exempt this tax on EBT/SNAP payments.

default_tax.description: key to define the tax as default

message: The Minimum order amount must be at least 0.01.

required_reward_points.description: required reward points of reward. if reward points calculation type is "points earned on visits" then required reward points must be greater then or equals to 0. and for other reward points calculation type reward points must be greater then or equals to 1.

minimum_order_amount.description: minimum order amount of reward. this field is required when reward points calculation type is "points earned on visits". Changing the minimum order amount will be applicable to all other previously created "Points Earned on Visits" type rewards.

reward_points_calculation_type_id.description: id of reward points calculation type.

promotion_type.description: promotion type to be included to create/update promotion

value.promotion_description: Sale Price X on Product Y
Amount or % off on Y Products

get.description:
This endpoint is used to get the details and description of promotion types:

There are 3 types of promotions in the system.

  'BX1' which is 'Buy X Get 1 Free' where X is Quantity of Product

  'BXPY' which is 'Buy X at Y Price' where X is Quantity & Y is Sale Price (Tiers)

  'SXPY' which is 'Sale Price X on Product Y' where X is Sale Price & Y is Product

  'APPY' which is 'Amount or % off on Y Products' where Amount or Percenatge is Discount & Y is Product

type.description: type of the promotion. please do check out /api/v2/promotion_types api for more deatils on the promotion type.

valid_from.description: date and time from promotion will be applicable.

valid_until.description: date and time until promotion will be applicable.

usage.description: number of times promotion has been used.

active.description: active status of the promotion.

is_category_department.description: is category department promotion or not.

exclude_discounts.description: If yes, additional item discounts will cannot be applied on items that are eligible as part of this promotions. Also, percentage order discounts will exclude this items.

error.message: URL active parameter value must be true or false.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: This is to get activated or deactivated promotions list. If true then it will get all the activated promotions and if false then it will get all the deactivated promotions. And if this not passed then by default it will display all the promotions list of the system.

get.description: This end point is used to get all the promotions which are available in the system.

data.name: Promo of $10 off on Y Products
Promo of 5.99% off on Y Products Category and Department

message: Buy quantity for type bx1 is required.
Promotion tiers for type bxpy is required.
Promotion sale price for type sxpy must be between 0.01 and 999999.99.
Promotion sale price for type sxpy is required in promotion products.

post.description:
This endpoint is used to create a new promotion in the system.

Please do check the List All Promotion Types (api/v2/promotion_types) api for more details about promotion types.

requestBody.description: Promotion body to be passed in the request to create a new promotion.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: particular promotion id to retrieve or update the promotion data.

value.name: Promo of $10 off on Y Products
Promo of 5.99% off on Y Products Category and Department

get.description: This endpoint is used to get the particular promotions and its details.

message: Promotion type can only be BX1 or BXPY or SXPY.
Promotion tiers for type bxpy is required.
Promotion sale price for type sxpy must be between 0.01 and 999999.99.
Promotion sale price for type sxpy is required in promotion products.

put.description: This endpoint is used to update the promotion and its related data.

requestBody.description:
This is the request payload to update the particular promotion based on the id.

Please do checkout the List all promotion types (api/v2/promotion_types) api for more details about the promotion types.

To update a specific promotion, all the required parameters must be included based on the promotion type.

get.description: Get the all coupons available in the system.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: This is to get activated or deactivated coupons data. If true then it will get all the activated coupons and if false then it will get all the deactivated coupons. if active parameter is not passed in query params then it will get active and deactive both coupons.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of coupons to skip.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of coupons returned.

message: Max_qty_to_apply field is required.
Product id field is required.
Visbl_in_ord_predefined_disc field is required.
Min_amt_to_apply must be at least 0.01.

error.message: Product not found on applied location.
Location is not associated with system.

post.description: You can use this end point for create a coupon.

schema.description: This is the basic model object to be  passed when you need to create coupon through api.

coupon_for.description: Type of coupon Order or Product.

product_ids.description: ids of products. It is required when your coupon_for is product.

visbl_in_ord_predefined_disc.description: Set true to display this coupon in Predefined discount dropdown at POS side. we can create predefined coupon for both "order" and "product" coupon_for.

audiance_type.description: targeted or generic. Not required only when visbl_in_ord_predefined_disc is set as true.

start_date.description:
start_date must be greater then currnet time.
start_date must be less then 2030-12-31 23:59:59.
start_date must be less then end_date.
Only required when coupon's audiance_type is set as "generic". 
format of start_date should be "yyyy-mm-dd HH:mm:ss".

end_date.description:
end_date must be greater then currnet time.
end_date must be less then 2030-12-31 23:59:59.
end_date must be greater then start_date.
Only required when coupon's audiance_type is set as "generic". 
format of end_date should be "yyyy-mm-dd HH:mm:ss".

discount_value.description:
discount_type = percentage than discount_value must be between 0.01 - 100
discount_type = Amount than discount_value must be between 0.01 - 999999.99
if coupon_for is "order" than discount_value must less than or equal to min_amt_to_apply. 
if coupon_for is "product" than discount value must be less than or equal to product's sale price.

min_amt_to_apply.description:
min_amt_to_apply must between 0.01 - 999999.99.
It is required when your coupon_for is set as "order". 
min_amt_to_apply must be greater then or equal to discount_value.

max_qty_to_apply.description:
max_qty_to_apply must between 1 - 999999.
It is required when your coupon_for is set as "product".

is_print_on_ord_rcpt.description:
It is required when your audiance_type is set as "generic". 
if value of is_print_on_ord_rcpt is true then detail of this coupon is display in order receipt.

apply_coupon_on_all_products.description: If value of apply_coupon_on_all_products is true then coupon discount will be applicable on all products of the order.

is_cat_dept_assigned.description: if the value of either Category or Department is true then false.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: particular coupon id to retrieve or update the coupon data.

get.description: This endpoint is used to get the particular coupon and its product details.

message: Max_qty_to_apply field is required.
Product id field is required.
Visbl_in_ord_predefined_disc field is required.
Min_amt_to_apply must be at least 0.01.

error.message: Product not found on applied location.
Location is not associated with system.

put.description: This endpoint is used to update the coupon and its related data.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: This parameter will be used to get active or deactivated tare containers list.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of tare containers to skip.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tare containers returned.

get.description: This api will be used to get the meta data of the tare containers which can be used in create/update product for sold by weight products.
This endpoint will provide all webhooks connected this tenant.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: This is to get activated or deactivated webhooks data. If true then it will get all the activated webhooks and if false then it will get all the deactivated webhooks. if active parameter is not passed in query params then it will return all webhooks including deactivated.

error.message: Data already exist for this Webhook.

post.description: This is the endpoint which will be used to create a new webhook.

requestBody.description: This is the request body with different example that you can use to create a new webhook in the system,

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: This is the particular id of the webhook that needs to be retrieved.

url.description: webhook url on which data has to be passed

auth_type.description: authentication type is given while creating the webhook

auth_value.description: auth value of the authentication type

location_id.description: location on which this webhook has been created.

active.description: status of the webhook

api_key.description: api key if the auth_type is "api"

api_value.description: api value only show if auth_type is "api"

get.description: This endpoint will provide the details of the particular webhook from the system.

delete.description: This endpoint will be used to delete the particular webhook data from the system.

get.description: This endpoint will provide the details about the Webhook types.

stay_on_category.description: This allows Point of Sale screen to stay on the same category page after adding the item to the order. This is useful in categories like Produce.

hide_cat_from_pos_attr.description: This allows Point of Sale screen to hide category from home page.

category_sort.description: This allow to sort the category based on the number in pos side.

active.description: Make category active or deactive. This will hide or unhide on the point of sale.

stay_on_dep_prod_page.description: After selection, POS will not stay on department product page.

hide_dep_from_pos_attr.description: Department is visible in POS product attributes.

department_sort.description: Sorting priority in POS (lower = higher priority).

min_age_verification.description: Minimum age (only matters if age_verification = true).

is_exclude_kds.description: Items will show in Kitchen Display System (KDS).

show_in_online_ordering.description: Department not shown in online ordering menu.

active.description: Department is active and usable.

name.description: Name of the Modifier set name..

only_one.description: Customer can select only one modifier from this set.

modifier_set_sort.description: Sorting priority of this modifier set (lower = higher).

active.description: Modifier set is active/Deactive.

modifiers.description:
name: name of modifier name

price → modifier cost.

sort → Display modifier order.

active  → This modifier is soft /hard  delete .

status → This modifier is active/ deactive.

active.description: whether the product is currently available in the system. defaults to true.

online_featured_product.description: boolean value. set it as a true if we want to display these product in main screen of online application. defaults to false.

vendors.description: a vendor in ecommerce refers to a person or business that sells products or services on an online platform.

item_code.description: vendor item code are unique identifiers assigned to each item sold by a vendor in an ecommerce platform.

age_verification.description: In order to protect bars, restaurant owners and convenience store owners that sell age-restricted products, POS has an Age Verification feature. This will help ensure that products that require age cannot be sold to under aged customers.

min_age_verification.description: minimun age to buy the age restricted product. this field is required when value of age_verification is true.

sold_by_weight.description: boolean value. set it as true if you want to sale these product by loose weight. defaults to false.

exclude_ebt.description: boolean value. set it as true if you want to sale these product with ebt tax exemption. defaults to false.

prompt_qty.description: boolean value. set it as true when you prompt for quantity on products.

variable_sale_price.description: boolean value. set to true if every time ask customer sale price. defaults to false.

exclude_kds.description: boolean value. set it as true if you don't want to display these product in kitchen display  screen(KDS) and in order print. defaults to false.

type.description: type of tax. amount or percentage.

rate.description: rate of tax. for "percentage" type tax, rate must between 0.01 to 100 and for "amount" type tax, rate must between 0.01 to 999999.99

exempt_ebt.description: If set this flag as true, then exempt this tax on EBT/SNAP payments.

active.description: whether the tax is currently available in the system. defaults to true.
whether the vendor is currently available in the system. defaults to true.
Purchase order active / deactive

purchase_order_items.description:
product_id → Product ID.

unit_of_measure_id→ Measure Unit type id

cost→Total cost.

quantity → Ordered quantity.

no_of_ea → Number of eaches (single units).

cost_unit  → Cost per unit.

active.description: whether the reward card is currently available in the system. defaults to true.

email_validated.description: email is validated to the system or not

zip_code.description: zip code of reward card location

birth_year.description: birth year of the reward card

created_at(utc).description: updated date time of reward card in UTC

updated_at(utc).description: updated date time of reward card in UTC

required_reward_points.description: required reward points of reward. if reward points calculation type is "points earned on visits" then required reward points must be greater then or equals to 0. and for other reward points calculation type reward points must be greater then or equals to 1.

minimum_order_amount.description: minimum order amount of reward. this field is required when reward points calculation type is "points earned on visits".

active.description: whether the reward is currently available in the system. defaults to true.

reward_point_calculation_type.description: reward point calculation type of reward.

paid.description: flag for order payment. true means fully paid.

paid_via_ebt_card.description: flag for payment with ebt card.

line_item_total_tax_collected.description: total tax collection value of order_line.

ebt_tax_collected.description: total ebt tax collection value of order_line.

extra_item.description: flag for extra item. true value consider item as extra item.

taxes.description: List of taxes that was attached to order_line.

payment_gateway.description: gateway on which payment was made.

coupon_type.description: coupon type of coupon. order or product.

discount_type.description: discount type of coupon. amount or percentage.

min_amount.description: minimum amount of coupon. value of this filed is null is coupon type is "product".

audiance_type.description: audiance type of coupon. generic or targeted.

max_qty_per_coupon.description: max qty per coupon of coupon. value of this field is null when coupon type is "order".

product.description: list of products attached with coupon.

id.description: id of reward point calculation type.

type.description: type of reward point calculation type.

wage_per_hour.description: salary amount of employee per hour.

permission.description: list of permissions attached with role.

active.description: whether the role is currently available in the system. defaults to true.

PromotionCreatePayload.title: PromotionCreatePayload
PromotionCreatePayload.description: This is the basic model object to be  passed when you need to create promotion through api.

promotion_type.description:
Promotion types: BX1/BXPY/SXPY/APPY. 

For more information checkout List All Promotion types api (/api/v2/promotion_types).

valid_from.description: (optional) date and time from promotion should be applied and only future values will be accepted.

valid_until.description: (optional) date and time until promotion should be applied and only future values will be accepted.

promotion_used_for_location_ids.description: locations for which promotion should be made

exclude_discounts.description: (Optional) If you want to exclude the discounts from the promotion

priority.description:
Use Promotion Type:- SXPY or APPY->Percenatge for category/department based promotion.

It's Required when Promotion Type:- SXPY or APPY->Percenatge for category/department based promotion.

If you want to set the promotion priority.

is_category_department.description:
Use Promotion Type:- APPY->Percenatge for category/department based promotion.

It's Required when Promotion Type:- APPY->Percenatge for category/department based promotion.

promotion_products.description: products to attached with this promotion.

promotion_sale_price_for_type_sxpy.description: promotion sale price required if only promotion type is SXPY

buy_quantity_for_type_bx1.description: buy quantity required if only promotion type is BX1

promotion_tiers_for_type_bxpy.description: promotion tiers required if only promotion type is BXPY

buy_qty_at.description: buy quantity for the product when type is BXPY

get_price_at.description: sale price for the product for the type BXPY

promotion_amount_or_percentage_for_type_.description: promotion amount or percenatge required if only promotion type is APPY.

discount_type.description: discount type of the product for the type APPY.

discount_value.description: discount value(amount/percenatge) of the product for the type APPY.

required_quantity.description: required quantity for the type APPY.

trigger_type.description:
trigger type for the type APPY.

Type Options:- onlyOnce,everyZQuantity,everyItemAfterThreshold

categories.description:
categories required for Appy type promotion and it's specially for category based promotion.


ids categories for category based promotion.

departments.description:
departments required for Appy type promotion and it's specially for departments based promotion.

ids departments for category based promotion.

PromotionUpdatePayload.title: PromotionUpdatePayload
PromotionUpdatePayload.description: This is the basic model object to be passed when you need to update promotion through api.

valid_from.description: (optional) date and time from promotion should be applied and only future values will be accepted.

valid_until.description: (optional) date and time until promotion should be applied and only future values will be accepted.

exclude_discounts.description: (Optional) When you want to exclude all the disacounts from this promotion

priority.description:
Use Promotion Type:- SXPY or APPY->Percenatge for category/department based promotion.

It's Required when Promotion Type:- SXPY or APPY->Percenatge for category/department based promotion.

If you want to set the promotion priority.

active.description: active status of the promotion.

promotion_products.description: products to attached with this promotion.

promotion_sale_price_for_type_sxpy.description: promotion sale price required if only promotion type is SXPY

delete.description:
delete product from promotion.

min one product required.

buy_quantity_for_type_bx1.description: buy quantity required if only promotion type is BX1

promotion_amount_or_percentage_for_type_.description: promotion amount or percenatge required if only promotion type is APPY.

discount_value.description: discount value(amount/percenatge) of the product for the type APPY.

required_quantity.description: required quantity for the type APPY.

categories.description:
categories required for Appy type promotion and it's specially for category based promotion.


ids categories for category based promotion.

departments.description:
departments required for Appy type promotion and it's specially for departments based promotion.

ids departments for category based promotion.

valid_from.description: date time from promotion is applicable

valid_until.description: date time until promotion is applicable

is_category_department.description: is category or department based promotion.

active.description: promotion active status

promotion_amount_or_percentage_for_type_.description: promotion amount or percenatge required if only promotion type is APPY.

discount_type.description: discount type of the product for the type APPY.

discount_value.description: discount value(amount/percenatge) of the product for the type APPY.

required_quantity.description: required quantity for the type APPY.

trigger_type.description:
trigger type for the type APPY.

Type Options:- onlyOnce,everyZQuantity,everyItemAfterThreshold

categories required for Appy type promotion and it's specially for category based promotion.

PromotionDetails.title: PromotionDetails
PromotionDetails.description: Promotion basic deatils like promotio location and product details

product_id.description: id of product attached with this promotion

buy_qty.description: quantity applied for promotion type BX1

get_free_qty.description: free quantity when promotion type is BX1

buy_qty_at.description: buy quantity when promotion type is BXPY

get_price_at.description: sae price of product when promotion type is BXPY

promo_sale_price.description: promotion sale price when promotion type is SXPY

created_at.description: date and time (UTC) when promotion details created

updated_at.description: date and time (UTC) when promotion details last updated

products.description: This object has the product details attached with promotion

location_id.description: location id on which this product is available

active.description: active status of the product

discount_type.description: discount type of coupon amount or percentage.

audiance_type.description: audiance type of coupon generic or targeted.

coupon_for.description: Type of coupon Order or Product.

min_amt_to_apply.description: minimum amount of order to apply this coupon.

visbl_in_ord_predefined_disc.description: value of these filed is true when need to display these coupon on order print.

apply_coupon_on_all_products.description: Value of these field is true when need to apply coupon discount on all products of the order.

max_qty_to_apply.description: Maximum number of products that can be discounted with a coupon.

coupon_code.description: Coupon code. value of coupon code is display when coupon's audiance type is generic.

active.description: whether the coupon is currently available in the system. defaults to true.

products.description: list of the products that the coupon is attached to.

valid_from.description: date time from promotion should be applied

valid_until.description: date time until promotion should be applied

active.description: active status of promotion

is_category_department.description: If it’s true, then this promotion is based on category and department.

exclude_discounts.description: If yes, additional item discounts will cannot be applied on items that are eligible as part of this promotions. Also, percentage order discounts will exclude this items.

buy_qty.description: buy quantity when promotion type is BX1

discount_type.description: discount type: amount or percentage when promotion type is APPY.

discount_value.description: discount value when promotion type is APPY.

required_quantity.description: required quantity when promotion type is APPY.

trigger_type.description: Default Trigger Types: onlyOnce,everyZQuantity,everyItemAfterThreshold when promotion type is APPY.

barcode.description: barcode of attached product in promotion

buy_qty_at.description: buy quantity when promotion type is BXPY

get_price_at.description: promotion sale price when promotion type is BXPY

promotional_sale_price.description: promotion sale price when promotion type is SXPY

original_sale_price.description: Original product sale price when product type is SXPY

categories.description: categories when promotion type is APPY.

departments.description: departments when promotion type is APPY.

pax_response.description: response of pax while refund initiated with card.

refund_type.description: type of refund. this field is visible in response when refund type "ITEMWISE".

Tare-Containers.title: Tare-Containers
Tare-Containers.description: This is the data model for the tare container

type.description:
type of the webhook.
For more details please refer Get All Webhook Types api

url.description: url of the webhook to which you wanna send the particular data

auth_type.description: authentication type of the given url (optional)

location_id.description: location id of the system on which you wanna create this particular webhook

active.description: webhook status (active/deactive)

api_key.description: api key is required only if auth_type is "api"

api_value.description: api_value is required only if auth_type is "api"

auth_value.description: auth_value which will be used as token_value if auth_type is "token"

type.description: type of the webhook it can be either "PRO"

url.description: url you want to send the data to

location_id.description: location you want to create webhook for.

auth_type.description:
auth_type of the url (optional)
It can be either "api" or "token"

api_key.description: api_key is required when the auth_type is "api"

api_value.description: auth_value is required when the auth_value is "api"

token_value.description: this field is required when auth_type is "token"
